# Generated by dafke v0.4.1 — do not edit manually

# Git Conventions

## Branch Naming
- Features: `feature/<short-description>` or `feature/<TICKET-ID>-<description>`
- Bug fixes: `bugfix/<short-description>` or `bugfix/<TICKET-ID>-<description>`
- Hotfixes: `hotfix/<description>`

## Commit Messages
Use conventional commits: `type(scope): description`
- `feat`: new feature
- `fix`: bug fix
- `refactor`: code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature
- `test`: adding or updating tests
- `docs`: documentation only
- `chore`: maintenance tasks

## Commit Discipline
- One logical change per commit
- Build and tests must pass before each commit
- Include `Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>` when AI-assisted

## Worktree Usage
- Use git worktrees for parallel development
- Naming: `feature/<desc>`, `bugfix/<desc>`
- Clean up worktrees after merge
